name: Caramel Chex
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, combine the butter, brown sugar, and corn syrup.
2. Microwave on high for 1 minute, stirring well to ensure even distribution of heat.
3. Continue microwaving in 30-second intervals until all ingredients are melted together and the mixture is smooth, stirring after each interval.
4. Add the cereal and toss to coat evenly.
